info.title: Legerity.PageObjectGenerator
info.description: A command line tool for auto generating page objects from Windows, Android, iOS, and web pages for UI tests using the Legerity framework

options.name: --input
options.description:
The path to the folder where platform pages exist that will
be generating page objects for. Default to the executing
folder.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The path to the folder where the generated class files
should be stored. Default to the 'Generated' folder in the
executing folder.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
The namespace to apply to the output page objects. Default
to 'LegerityTests.Pages'.

options.name: --platform
options.description:
Required. The platform that will be generating page objects
for.
